_meta.purpose: Brand-identity (fit) layer for the Base Camp concierge. Pairs with advisor-overlay.json (commercial layer).
_meta.method: AI-generated characterizations from general brand knowledge (cutoff Jan 2026). NOT scraped from official sites. officialUrl/sourceSnapshot left null pending the live-fetch + advisor-review step in SUPPLIER-FIT-SPEC.md section 8.
_meta.schema: positioning {tier, priceIndex 1-5, vibe[], serviceStyle, differentiators[]} for hotels; cruise/yacht add {shipScale, paxBand, expeditionDepth 1-5, cuisine}. idealGuest/notIdealFor use archetype vocabulary.
_meta.independents: lhw / slh / relais-chateaux / design-hotels / preferred-hotels / independent-virtuoso are UMBRELLA profiles. Hotel-atlas independents have an empty 'brand' field (tagged by 'program'), so to inherit an umbrella the resolver must fall back: brand -> program -> 'independent-virtuoso'. One-line change in resolveBrandId() (see note).
_meta.resolverNote: function resolveBrandId(item){ return brandIndex[ci(item.brand)] || brandIndex[ci(item.program)] || 'independent-virtuoso' || null; }  // for hotel items only; cruise/yacht resolve on brand as before
_meta.reviewStatus: DRAFT - advisor to verify tier/ideal-guest calls, especially for the 'unknown'/placeholder lines and any brand whose positioning has shifted.

four-seasons.summary: The global gold standard for consistent, anticipatory service.

aman.summary: Minimalist sanctuaries built around privacy and transformative calm.

rosewood.summary: Residential luxury rooted in local culture and place.
aliases: hotel de crillon a rosewood hotel

mandarin-oriental.summary: Asian-rooted elegance with some of the world's best spas.

ritz-carlton.summary: Timeless formal luxury; dependable for families and occasions.

ritz-carlton-reserve.summary: The ultra-rare, deeply immersive tier above Ritz-Carlton.

st-regis.summary: Astor-era glamour with signature butler service.

edition.summary: Schrager-designed lifestyle luxury with a nightlife pulse.

bulgari.summary: Italian fashion-house glamour in sleek urban jewel boxes.

waldorf-astoria.summary: Grand landmark luxury, Hilton's flagship tier.

conrad.summary: Contemporary Hilton luxury for the modern traveler.

sofitel.summary: French art de vivre with local character.

raffles.summary: Storied grande-dame glamour with signature butler service.

anantara.summary: Indulgent experiential resorts in exotic destinations.

six-senses.summary: Pioneering wellness and sustainability in barefoot luxury.

soneva.summary: Intelligent barefoot luxury and castaway escapism.

the-peninsula.summary: Tech-forward grande dame with legendary fleets.

oetker.summary: Discreet European grandeur and legendary addresses.

dorchester.summary: Iconic grand-dame hotels across Europe and the US.

rocco-forte.summary: Family-run European classics with personal warmth.

belmond.summary: Storied properties and journeys; the romance of travel (LVMH).

auberge.summary: Intimate residential resorts with a deep sense of place.

montage.summary: Polished American resort luxury, especially strong for families.

one-and-only.summary: Statement resort luxury balancing family and romance.

atlantis.summary: Entertainment mega-resort; The Royal is the elevated tier.

jumeirah.summary: Grand Arabian-rooted luxury, home of the Burj Al Arab.

kempinski.summary: European grand-hotel heritage, Europe's oldest luxury group.

langham.summary: Classic refined hospitality with afternoon-tea heritage.

cheval-blanc.summary: LVMH's maison hotels at the apex of French luxury.

the-setai.summary: Serene Asian-influenced Art Deco luxury in Miami Beach.

lhw.summary: Umbrella for independent, often iconic luxury hotels; character over conformity.

slh.summary: Umbrella for small, independent, characterful luxury hotels.

relais-chateaux.summary: Gastronomy-led intimate independents; charm and the table at the center.

preferred-hotels.summary: Large independent-hotel program; character varies by property and tier.

differentiators: generic fallback for unbranded Virtuoso hotels

independent-virtuoso.summary: Fallback identity for unbranded independents tagged to a consortium; refine per property.

silversea.summary: Ultra-luxury all-inclusive ocean cruising with a real expedition arm.

regent.summary: The most-inclusive luxury cruise; opulent and spacious.

seabourn.summary: Intimate ultra-luxury cruising with a growing expedition side.

crystal.summary: Relaunched classic luxury cruising; refined and spacious.

four-seasons-yacht.summary: Four Seasons' superyacht-style debut at the apex of yachting.

ponant.summary: French design-led expedition; comfort-forward polar and remote sailings.

scenic.summary: Scenic Eclipse discovery yachts plus luxury river cruising.

lindblad.summary: National Geographic expedition cruising with science at the core.

quark.summary: Polar-only specialist; deep adventure over plush.

hurtigruten-expeditions.summary: Accessible, sustainability-minded polar and expedition cruising.

heritage-line.summary: Design-led Asian river yachts on the Mekong, Irrawaddy and Halong Bay.

uniworld.summary: Boutique, opulently decorated, all-inclusive river cruising.

amawaterways.summary: Premium-luxury river cruising with wellness, biking and family options.

avalon-waterways.summary: Premium river cruising known for open-air suites.

riverside.summary: Luxury river cruising aboard the former Crystal river fleet.

tauck.summary: Curated all-inclusive land-and-river journeys; strong for multigen.

emerald.summary: Contemporary river cruising plus a small yacht-cruise arm.

viking.summary: Understated, adults-only, culture-forward (river, ocean and expedition).

azamara.summary: Destination-immersive cruising with overnights and late stays.

holland-america.summary: Classic premium cruising with music and enrichment.

paul-gauguin.summary: Intimate Tahiti and South Pacific specialist.

victory-cruise-lines.summary: Great Lakes and US coastal small-ship cruising.

american-cruise-line.summary: US river and coastal small-ship cruising.

royal-caribbean.summary: Activity-packed mega-ships; off-brand for a luxury concierge.

carnival.summary: Budget mass-market cruising; off-brand for luxury.

msc.summary: European value mass-market; off-brand for luxury (note: owns Explora Journeys).

norwegian.summary: Freestyle mainstream cruising; off-brand for luxury.

disney-cruise.summary: Family/character cruising; relevant only for dedicated family asks.

sea-cloud.summary: Authentic tall-ship sailing under real canvas.

differentiators: sail and motor yachts, foodie focus

windstar.summary: Intimate small-ship sail and motor yachts; foodie-forward.

abercrombie-kent.summary: Bespoke private-jet expeditions and luxury tailor-made journeys.

airelles.summary: Palace-level French hospitality for history-minded ultra-luxury travelers.

positioning.serviceStyle: highly consistent Four Seasons service on air and ground

four-seasons-private-jet.summary: The most seamless branded-hospitality private jet product for clients who want comfort and predictability everywhere.

aman-jet.summary: Aman-style private jet travel for privacy, quiet design, and deeply curated regional access.

remote-lands.summary: Boutique private jet expeditions with Aman-level design, privacy, and deep cultural access.

tcs-world-travel.summary: The private-jet logistics powerhouse for ambitious around-the-world and multi-country itineraries.

national-geographic.summary: Private jet expeditions where the intellectual and photographic lens matters more than maximal pampering.

lakani.summary: Intimate private-jet touring for well-traveled clients seeking less obvious routes.

signature-jet-journeys.summary: Regional private-jet journeys for clients who want curated access without a full around-the-world program.

seasonz.summary: New Zealand specialist for active luxury, golf, and high-touch regional planning.

aman-at-sea.summary: Aman privacy and wellness translated into a low-density luxury yacht experience.

orient-express-yachts.summary: Romantic French sailing-yacht luxury for design purists and old-world maritime theater.

the-world.summary: A private residential ship for ultra-high-net-worth travelers who want a permanent global community at sea.
